name: Diabetic Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Artificial Sweetener (equal to 1 C. sugar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook raisins until soft.
2. Drain the water from the cooked raisins and add them to the applesauce, eggs, artificial sweetener, oil mixture.
3. Mix well, then blend in the baking soda, flour, and remaining ingredients.
4. Bake at 350 Degrees Fahrenheit for 30-35 minutes in an 8-inch x 8-inch or 9-inch x 9-inch pan.
